dct_title_s: New York City Predicted Black Carbon Surface, 2011
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
dct_description_sm: New York City Predicted Black Carbon Surface, 2011 is a raster dataset representing estimated levels of Black Carbon in New York City in 2011. The resolution is approximately 300 meters and values are micrograms per cubic meter. This dataset was generated for the air pollution rasters dataset on NYC Open Data at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Environment/NYCCAS-Air-Pollution-Rasters/q68s-8qxv/about_data in May of 2026. Columbia Libraries has made this available in GeoTIFF format in State Plane Coordinates. Original documentation can be found in the full download package.
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
dct_rightsHolder_sm: Center for International Earth Science Information Network
